title: dichrocephala benthamii
intro: Dichrocephala benthamii, also known as False Buttonweed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dichrocephala benthamii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat digestive issues, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
